Video.summary: Lifeguards try to resuscitate a lifeless man found face down in the surf. And Reidy's back.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 01

Video.summary: After a drunk reveller falls 20 metres off a cliff, lifeguards can’t believe the state he’s in.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 09

Video.summary: Lifeguards respond to a suspected heart attack. Two green whistles are used for a dislocated shoulder.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 03

Video.summary: New Years brings Snoop Dogg, rips rescues, a girl crying wolf and a helicopter search for a missing swimmer.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 02

Video.summary: A car crashes on to Bondi Beach. Taco flips the jetski, ruining his plans to impress Hoppo before he leaves.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 06

Video.summary: A man breaks his leg, Maxi uses a tracking device to locate a thief and a bunch of school kids run wild.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 12

Video.summary: Troy rescues a young girl. Glick takes Kerrbox, who is afraid of heights, up in a helicopter.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 11

Video.summary: A young boy suffers a spinal injury on his birthday. Lifeguards bring their kids to Bondi.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 07

Video.summary: Tommy rescues intoxicated tourists. Reidy pursues creeps on the beach. A Danish backpacker bares all on Bondi.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 10

Video.summary: When surfer Damo is treated for a spinal injury, lifeguards fear the worst.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 07

Video.summary: The biggest mass rescue in years sees Bondi Beach closed. Nicola joins the team and leads a mass rescue.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 02

Video.summary: A Japanese tourist drowns just metres from lifeguards trying to save him. Beardy races to 2 Nepalese men.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 01

Video.summary: Lifeguards rescue a surfer being smashed against cliffs. Drunk Irishmen dance in tutus and frolic in the nude.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 05

Video.summary: A brawl takes place at the North end. Tommy and Harries attempt a number of rescues.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 08

Video.summary: Singlets returns to work, Pierre from Hong Kong meets the lifeguards and Hoppo teaches kids rip safety.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 13

Video.summary: A diabetic suffers an epileptic fit and Troy catches bag thieves operating on Bondi.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 05

Video.summary: Lifeguards face frustrating distractions involving lost gear, wayward children, ball games, and somersaults
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 06

Video.summary: A man assaults women in the surf. Lifeguards take part in a 30 day fitness and diet challenge.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 12

Video.summary: Lifeguards attend a deep water spinal rescue, and try catch a rat that’s been eating cables in their buggies.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 11

Video.summary: A surfer suffers a serious fin chop and Will attempts to run for 48 hours with no sleep.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 03

Video.summary: Bluebottles swarm at Bondi, so Harries devises a magical treatment for the stings.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 08

Video.summary: Harries plays matchmaker for Singlets. Lifeguards save 7 people caught in two separate rips.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 04

Video.summary: It's the busiest day in a decade for Bondi lifeguards, with more than one hundred rescues.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 02

Video.summary: New trainee Tommy volunteers to catch a sea snake. Jesse clears the water to save an unresponsive man.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 02

Video.summary: Big waves come to Bondi and Maxi hits trouble during a daring jetski rescue.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 06

Video.summary: Tommy faces seaweed perils on the jetski. Chase and Will rush north on the jetski for a cliff fall.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 05

Video.summary: Borders open, tourists flood Bondi. Chase explores a shark colony with a local diver.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 06

Video.summary: Spotlights illuminate World Pride Beach Party with 15,010 revelers. Hoppo marks 30 years on the beach.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 11

Video.summary: After a mass rescue, lifeguards search for a student who didn't make it back to the beach.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 09

Video.summary: New trainee Ryan struggles with the megaphone. Jethro hits it off with a pair of drag queens.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 01

Video.summary: Jesse, alone in the tower, can't assist a drowning man as all lifeguards are busy in the water.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 02

Video.summary: A local surf photographer aids in saving a tourist. 'Jewellery Rescue' search for a missing wedding ring.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 04

Video.summary: A 2 year old girl is trapped in a locked car. Lifeguards chase a bag thief. Swimmers go under after hours.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 08

Video.summary: Lifeguards deal with drug and alcohol affected masses. Nicola loses her cool with beach goers.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 06

Video.summary: Heidi Klum visits Bondi for a photoshoot. Harrison faces 3 drowning people. Surgery on a dislocated knee.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 07

Video.summary: Bluebottles attack Bondi. Mouse handles a missing boy, a dislocated shoulder, and a drug overdose.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 09

Video.summary: Christmas at Bondi overwhelms lifeguards. Jake and Jackson struggle with rescues, and Maxi makes a wrong move.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 03

Video.summary: Lifeguards investigate a floating object a kilometre offshore, Mario rescues a woman on an inflatable tomato.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 09

Video.summary: A lighting strike survival. A young spinal patient hits Singlets too close to home. Gavin bogs the buggy.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 08

Video.summary: New Year's festivities turn dark with a teenage drug overdose and mass rescues.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 04

Video.summary: Chase mans the tower alone, and Dylan deals with a spinal incident. Off the beach, Hoppo apprehends a thief.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 01

Video.summary: Swimmer in trouble refuses rescue. Faddy deals with a motionless man. Reidy and Corey assist two drunk girls.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 10

Video.summary: A body is reported to lifeguards. Stormy weather brings a missing kayaker. Max McGuigan's first rescue.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 02

Video.summary: A flasher's reported. Will and Bagus do continuous rescues. Jethro and Chase test a homemade throne in the surf.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 08

Video.summary: Surfer seeks refuge from angry beachgoer. Spiderman visits the beach. Lifeguard teams compete in a race.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 07

Video.summary: Lifeguards aid surfers and chase an odd beach intruder. Australia Day brings Harrison's toughest rescue yet.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 04

Video.summary: Rookie Max wows with a rescue. A Korean student's surfing trip turns painful. Stolen car keys are reported.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 09

Video.summary: A rough tackle halts a beach gridiron game. Harrison deals with bluebottles and a rat in the skate bowl.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 06
